content_body: What a marvelous cabin this is! Wow, wow, and more WOW! My wife and daughter enjoyed the beautiful outdoors and a good game of pool! This is a very special place and we plan to come back! The view is terrific and the fresh mountain air is great for the soul! God's beauty is all around. Thank you for opening your cabin up to us! ~ The Mitchells
title: Wow, wow, WOW!
